name: cortex
description: Semantic cognition layer for your workspace - organize files by projects, tags, and types

commands.title: Cortex: Add tag to current file
Cortex: Assign project to current file

cortex.projectAutoAssign.enabled.description: Automatically assign projects based on time and folder clustering.

cortex.projectAutoAssign.windowHours.description: Time window (hours) used to cluster files worked on together.

cortex.projectAutoAssign.minClusterSize.description: Minimum number of files required for a cluster to be considered.

cortex.projectAutoAssign.dominanceThresh.description: Share of already-assigned files in a cluster needed to propagate a project.

cortex.projectAutoAssign.suggestionThres.description: Minimum confidence required to store a project suggestion instead of auto-assigning.

cortex.llm.enabled.description: Enable AI-powered features using a local LLM service (requires Ollama or compatible service).

cortex.llm.endpoint.description: Local LLM API endpoint URL (Ollama default: http://localhost:11434).

cortex.llm.model.description: Model to use for AI operations (e.g., llama3.2, mistral, codellama, phi3).

cortex.llm.maxContextTokens.description: Maximum number of characters to send as context to the LLM.

cortex.llm.autoSummary.enabled.description: Automatically generate and cache AI summaries during indexing.

cortex.llm.autoSummary.maxFileSize.description: Maximum file size (bytes) to summarize during automatic indexing.

cortex.llm.autoSummary.maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent AI summary requests during indexing.

cortex.llm.autoIndex.enabled.description: Automatically generate AI tags and project suggestions during indexing.

cortex.llm.autoIndex.applyTags.description: Automatically apply AI-suggested tags during indexing.

cortex.llm.autoIndex.applyProjects.description: Automatically apply AI project suggestions during indexing.

cortex.llm.autoIndex.useSuggestedContext.description: Store AI project suggestions as suggested contexts instead of assigning.

cortex.llm.autoIndex.maxFileSize.description: Maximum file size (bytes) to process for AI tags/projects.

cortex.llm.autoIndex.maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent AI tag/project requests during indexing.

cortex.mirror.maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent document mirror jobs to limit memory usage.

cortex.mirror.maxFileSizeMB.description: Maximum file size (MB) eligible for mirror generation.
